About

The Command
& Control layer.

Founded in 2022, SKEYEBOTS builds the intelligence layer that connects sensors, agents, and commanders — from raw data to decisive autonomous action. Built in India. Built for the world.

01
Integrated C4AI ISR
Not sensors. Not drones. The unified perception and command layer that orchestrates all of them.
02
Multi-Agent Autonomy
Self-aware agents that coordinate and reconfigure together — without human input at every step.
03
Field-Validated
Tested by the Indian Army on LAC & LOC border environments. Real terrain. Not simulation.
